name: Italian Chicken Pastry Bites
recipeInstructions:
1 Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit.
2 In a skillet, combine the chicken, spaghetti sauce, and minced garlic. Heat until warmed through.
3 Separate the crescent rolls into triangles.
4 Place the chicken mixture in the center of each triangle.
5 Distribute the mozzarella cheese over the chicken if desired.
6 Surround the chicken with the sides of the roll and pinch closed to seal.
7 Bake for 15 minutes, or until golden brown, on a baking stone.
